objective: Produce a self-contained packet bundle that closes the authority-manifest, packet-artifact, trust-evidence, and local-admission gaps for the collapsed ChatGPT-owned plan/implement process.

in_scope: required machine and human packet artifacts
out_of_scope: mutating kernel authority outside this packet bundle

constraints: Local runtime owns validation, admission, and realization.
All artifact paths must be repo-relative.
Human review remains external and authoritative.
Formatting-only changes must not stale approval basis.
assumptions: The local runtime may use digest-attested trust records instead of external PKI.
The packet bundle should be self-contained for review and validation.
The canonical packet root is generated/packets/<packet_id>/.
requested_outputs: authority manifest instance and trust material
acceptance_criteria: All required artifacts exist and validate.
All refs resolve within the bundle.
Authority and trust inputs are instantiated, not missing.
Artifact fingerprints are materialized, not placeholders.
A local runner can validate admission and report review gate status.
review_criteria: Packet constraints match local execution boundary.
Trust evidence matches authority and delegation material.
No artifact claims effective human approval.
